summary: Core pipeline needs completion before any polish work

items.title: Implement end-to-end council execution
items.rationale: Users cannot run crucible without a working council pipeline
items.risk: Project remains unusable as a product

items.title: Add progress indicators during council run
items.rationale: Multi-model runs take time; users need feedback
items.risk: Users think the tool is hung during long operations
items.evidence: No output between invocation and result

meta.vision_alignment: Vision emphasizes interactive and actionable output
